text.title: PM Certification Changes 2026 Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema draft-07 for the report artefact this methodology produces. Validator rejects artefacts that violate the schema or any forbidden pattern.

example.note: effective_date not const; weights_table empty; prep_time_deltas missing profiles; sources empty.

list.item: weights_table with fewer than 3 rows or missing delta_pp.
sources containing only third-party blog posts.
weights_table delta_pp inconsistent with eco_2026_pct - eco_2021_pct.
